infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: InspectProof uses your camera to photograph site conditions, defects, and inspection evidence for your reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: InspectProof accesses your photo library to attach existing photos to inspection reports and defect records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: InspectProof saves annotated inspection photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: InspectProof uses your location to record the site coordinates of inspections.

plugins.photosPermission: InspectProof accesses your photo library to attach photos to inspection records and reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: InspectProof uses your camera to photograph site conditions and defects for inspection reports.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: InspectProof uses your location to record the site coordinates of inspections.
